chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.17 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.212/2026 3. For hearing of main case 05.05.2026 Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, Advocate for the applicant Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Asif
